backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor for the G&S Medical backend, defining data types (Medicine, SellerAccount, Customer, etc.) and CRUD operations for medicines, sellers, customers, site content, and chat messages, with access control and user approval integration.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting a single implemented feature: changing the hero section CTA button background in HomePage.tsx from white to a white-pink tone (bg-pink-100).
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON map of frontend source file paths to short human-readable summaries describing each file's purpose and key implementation details.
frontend/index.css: Global CSS entry point that imports Tailwind directives and defines CSS custom properties for light and dark theme color tokens used throughout the app.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML shell for the G&S Medical React SPA, mounting the app into a root div and loading the main TypeScript module.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that configures TanStack Router with all application routes (home, admin, seller, customer, seller detail) and wraps the app in ThemeProvider and Toaster.
frontend/src/components/admin/MedicineMa: Admin CRUD interface for medicines, featuring a table of individual medicine rows, add/edit dialog form, and delete confirmation dialog with toast notifications.
frontend/src/components/admin/SellerMana: Admin CRUD interface for seller accounts with inline status-change dropdowns, edit/delete dialogs, and toast feedback.
frontend/src/components/admin/WebsiteCon: Admin editor for named site content fields (hero headline, about text, announcements, etc.) with per-field save, character count, and loading states.
Reusable wrapper component that uses IntersectionObserver to trigger CSS entrance animations (fade-up, fade-in, slide-left, slide-right) on child content when scrolled into view, with reduced-motion support.
frontend/src/components/ChatWidget.tsx: Floating chat widget with a toggle button and popup window styled with a pink background, supporting user/bot message exchange, quick-question shortcuts, and a simulated typing delay using a local chatbot utility.
frontend/src/components/MedicineCard.tsx: Presentational card component that displays a medicine's image, name, category, description, price, stock, and availability badge with hover animations and emerald/gold styling.
frontend/src/components/Navigation.tsx: Responsive top navigation bar with scroll-aware styling, smooth-scroll section links, and customer auth login/logout controls including a mobile hamburger menu.
frontend/src/components/ProtectedRoute.t: Wraps admin routes to redirect unauthenticated users to /admin login page using the useAuth hook.
frontend/src/components/SellerCard.tsx: Displays a single seller's summary card (name, status badge, phone, address, license) that navigates to the seller detail page on click.
frontend/src/components/SellersSection.t: Landing page section that fetches and renders a grid of active SellerCards with loading skeletons and an empty-state fallback.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Creates and caches an ICP backend actor using React Query, returning either an anonymous or authenticated actor based on the current Internet Identity, and invalidates dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useAuth.ts: Provides simple admin authentication via localStorage with hardcoded credentials, exposing login, logout, and isAuthenticated state.
frontend/src/hooks/useCustomerAuth.ts: Manages customer authentication token in localStorage, exposing login, logout, and isAuthenticated state for customers.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Implements an Internet Identity authentication provider and hook using DFINITY's AuthClient, managing identity state, login/logout flows, and exposing status flags via React context.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Centralizes all React Query hooks for backend interactions, covering CRUD operations for sellers, medicines, site content, and customers, as well as authentication mutations for sellers and customers.
frontend/src/hooks/useSellerAuth.ts: Manages seller authentication token in localStorage, exposing login, logout, and isAuthenticated state for sellers.
frontend/src/index.css: Defines global styles, Tailwind imports, CSS custom properties for the G&S Medical emerald-green and gold theme, and utility classes for gradients, animations, and typography.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app wrapped with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/pages/AdminDashboard.tsx: Renders the admin dashboard with a sidebar navigation and tabbed views for overview stats, medicine management, seller management, and website content editing.
frontend/src/pages/AdminLoginPage.tsx: Renders the admin login page with email/password form, handles authentication via useAuth hook, and redirects to the admin dashboard on success.
frontend/src/pages/CustomerLoginPage.tsx: Renders the customer login page with email/password form, calls the customer login mutation, and redirects to the home page on success or shows a registration success message.
frontend/src/pages/CustomerSignUpPage.ts: Renders the customer registration form with validation for name, email, password, and phone fields, then calls the register mutation and redirects to the login page on success.
frontend/src/pages/HomePage.tsx: Renders the public-facing home page including a hero section, sellers section, stats, and contact info, fetching active sellers via a query hook.
frontend/src/pages/SellerDashboard.tsx: Renders the authenticated seller dashboard showing seller profile details and status, with logout functionality and redirect to login if unauthenticated.
frontend/src/pages/SellerDetailPage.tsx: Displays a public seller profile page fetched by ID, showing contact info, status badge, license details, and WhatsApp/call links, with loading skeleton and not-found states.
frontend/src/pages/SellerLoginPage.tsx: Renders the seller login form with email/password fields, handles authentication via useSellerLogin and useSellerAuth hooks, and redirects to the seller dashboard on success.
frontend/src/pages/SellerSignUpPage.tsx: Provides a seller registration form with validation for all required fields, submits via useRegisterSeller, and shows a success or error state based on the API response.
frontend/src/utils/chatbot.ts: Defines FAQ pattern-matching logic and store contact constants for a virtual assistant chatbot that returns predefined responses based on user message keywords.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for reading URL query parameters from both standard and hash-based routing, persisting them in sessionStorage, and cleaning sensitive params from the URL hash.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration for the frontend, extending the default theme with custom fonts (Outfit, Playfair Display), OKLCH-based color tokens (emerald, gold, sidebar, chart, etc.), border radii, box shadows, and plugins for typography, container queries, and animations.
project_state.json: Project state manifest (version 17) for the G&S MEDICAL website, documenting the summary, architectural notes (admin credentials, contact info), known issues, and a detailed list of all existing implemented features including homepage, admin dashboard, seller/customer auth, AI assistant, and WhatsApp integration.
